preserveUserBrands: assets/brands/* except assets/brands/example/ (example is updatable, user brands are not)

featureFlags._doc: Runtime feature flags read at Electron startup. Do NOT rely on these for security-critical defaults — a stale version.json on an offline client stays at the shipped values. Security-critical changes must land as code pushes with a version bump.

notes: v1.22.4: Persona × Landing-Page × Andromeda binding + Shopify App Store unblock + Meta-connect parse fix. Anchor: 2026-05-14. PERSONA × LP × ANDROMEDA (RSI iters 1-5 — the centerpiece systemic upgrade): every creative the matrix sampler produces is now structurally tagged to (a) ONE persona from the brand's manifest roster, (b) ONE landing page that warms that persona, AND (c) a 3-axis Andromeda signature (Race, Context, Style) so a 20-image batch never silently mono-cultures. SCHEMA (PR #188): BrandManifest gains Personas, LandingPages, AndromedaAxes, ForbiddenPersonas, ForbiddenLandingPages — every field is optional for back-compat (asset-only legacy manifests still load clean). New validateBrandManifest mirrors brand_guide.go's validator pattern with the load-bearing mono-ethnic refusal invariant (≥2 non-zero race buckets required). 24 new schema tests in brand_manifest_persona_test.go. ADBRIEF + CHECKBRIEF (PR #189): AdBrief gains PersonaSlug, LandingPageURL, Race, Context, Style fields. CheckBrief emits 7 new IssueError codes (persona_missing / persona_unknown / persona_forbidden_for_brand / landing_page_missing / landing_page_unknown / landing_page_forbidden_for_brand / persona_landing_page_incompatible). Prompt builder bakes persona emotional triggers + race + context + style into the rendered prompt as scene/style anchors near opening-token weight. MATRIX (PR #189/#264): merlin-creative-engine SKILL.md Phase 1 matrix grown from 8 → 13 axes (persona / landing_page / race / context / style added). matrix_integrity.go runtime gate enforces forbidden_* HARD vetoes, persona ↔ LP compatibility, race never-mono-ethnic, axis-collapse checks. OUTPUT BINDING (PR #189): RunMeta + WisdomAdEntry + meta.go link_url + wisdom-api aggregation buckets — every creative records (persona_slug, persona_label, landing_page_url, race, context, style) in metadata.json AND in cross-brand telemetry. Archive cards surface '→ <persona> → <LP path>' label on every matrix-driven run. AUTO-FILL (PR #264): brand-manifest-scaffolder.js accepts structured personas + LPs + andromeda axes via opts.extras; applyRaceDefault injects US Census distribution when persona declares no race_distribution (fail-safe defends never-mono-ethnic invariant); andromeda_axes defaults to 11 contexts + 8 styles when not overridden. SHOPIFY APP STORE UNBLOCK (PR #190): App Store rejected v1.22.3 submission on rule 2.1.1 — reviewer's first install raced Shopify's 5-30s token-propagation window, hit a 403 on /shop.json, and saw the dashboard's orange banner exposing the raw status code. Three fixes shipped together: shopifyAdminFetch retries on 403 with [0, 1500, 3000]ms backoff (covers the propagation race), the stub renderer drops the alarming orange banner (raw status codes never surface to users per Hard-Won Rule 6), <meta http-equiv='refresh' content='10'> closes the race window without user intervention. META-CONNECT PARSE FIX (PR #265): live incident — Meta OAuth completed successfully but the binary printed two JSON blocks back-to-back, the old extractJsonBlock line-trim heuristic concatenated them, JSON.parse failed with 'Unexpected non-whitespace character after JSON at position 73', raw error surfaced in the Connection Failed modal. Two fixes: extractJsonBlock gains a balanced-brace fallback scanner with string-literal awareness that correctly identifies a single complete JSON object; friendlyError gains a 'Failed to parse exchange result' branch that emits a sympathetic Reconnect chip instead of passing the raw parse error verbatim. ANDROMEDA-FRIENDLY DEFAULTS: DefaultAndromedaContexts (at-home, kitchen, bedroom, bathroom, on-the-go, commute, desk-at-work, workout, outdoors, social, travel), DefaultAndromedaStyles (lifestyle-candid, lifestyle-staged, layflat, product-hero-clean, ugc-still, editorial, macro-detail, environmental-portrait), DefaultUSCensusRaceDistribution. TEST COVERAGE: 24 schema tests, 13 brief-discipline tests, 11 matrix-integrity tests, 7 scaffolder-persona tests, 8 Shopify-403-retry tests, 15 oauth-parse-fix tests. Full Go suite + full JS suite (1212/1212) stay green. NO BREAKING CHANGES — legacy brands without a persona-equipped manifest still generate creatives via the existing free-prose path; the schema additions are pure enhancement. The matrix sampler in merlin-creative-engine will adopt the 5 new axes as agent-side discipline; runtime gates catch sampler bugs at CheckBrief time.
whatsNew: Every creative now tags back to its persona + landing page + race/context/style signature — see the binding on every archive card
Brand manifest schema adds personas[], landing_pages[], andromeda_axes — fail-safe US Census race distribution prevents mono-ethnic batches
Shopify App Store submission unblocker: reviewer-tripping 403 banner replaced with silent auto-recovery (rule 2.1.1)
Meta connection no longer pops a raw JSON.parse error — balanced-brace scanner + friendly Reconnect chip on fallback
merlin-creative-engine matrix grows 8 → 13 axes; runtime gate enforces persona ↔ LP compatibility + never-mono-ethnic
